title: ferray-polynomial: no convert/cast methods for cross-basis conversion with domain
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's polynomial classes have convert(domain, kind, window) to change basis while preserving the polynomial function, and cast(series, domain, window) to reinterpret coefficients in a new domain. ferray-polynomial has ToPowerBasis and FromPowerBasis traits for basis conversion but no domain-aware conversion. Without domain/window (#474), cross-basis conversion loses the mapping context.
